text.message: You should rob blue all game out of spite

i am not keeping road btw
dont let the 5 points fool u
im not crying at all lol but u may win rn
Also wondering…one of the more confusing attacks I’ve ever seen, directed at nobody

We need more, black needs one road to get 7
